name: showrunner
description: Cast management and QLab OSC bridge for interactive theatre

scripts.dist-dmg: npm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg --publish never && hdiutil convert dist/Dacha-Dice-AYLI-mac.dmg -format UDRW -o dist/staging.dmg && hdiutil attach dist/staging.dmg -mountpoint /Volumes/Dacha-Dice-AYLI -noverify -noautoopen && codesign --force --deep --sign - "/Volumes/Dacha-Dice-AYLI/Dacha-Dice-AYLI.app" && hdiutil detach /Volumes/Dacha-Dice-AYLI && rm dist/Dacha-Dice-AYLI-mac.dmg && hdiutil convert dist/staging.dmg -format UDZO -o dist/Dacha-Dice-AYLI-mac.dmg && rm dist/staging.dmg && open dist/
scripts.build-local: npm run build && electron-builder --mac dir --publish never && codesign --force --deep --sign - dist/mac-arm64/Dacha-Dice-AYLI.app && open dist/mac-arm64/Dacha-Dice-AYLI.app
